manual_boundaries: no exchange mutation from this audit

cases.label: Capital GOLD clean start-to-close chain
Delayed broker acknowledgement stays active until proof arrives
Duplicate route blocked while prior lifecycle is open
Restart recovery attaches orphan broker position and keeps missing links visible
Recovered Capital position exits through close ack, absence proof, and P/L outcome
Recovered close acknowledgement stays active until broker absence proof
Alpaca, Binance, and Kraken open orders recover with broker ids
Partial fill keeps quantities, price, fees, and client/broker ids
Close acknowledgement does not become closed while broker still reports the position
Stale broker proof holds action and cannot certify lifecycle advancement
Recovered stale close proof cannot certify closed or outcome state
Broker failure and unknown states map to explicit lifecycle statuses

manual_boundaries: Binance order/test or Spot Testnet only

close_fill_proof: dealReference must be confirmed before dealId is trusted
requirements.recovery_expectation: On restart, recover Capital positions by dealId and attach them to a lifecycle.
requirements.requirement: Capital submit proof carries dealReference before broker acknowledgement.
requirements.timeout_behavior: Hold as submitted/unverified until confirm or positions proof resolves the reference.

close_fill_proof: dealId is the close/reconciliation key
requirements.recovery_expectation: Recovered Capital positions must retain dealId and route key.
requirements.requirement: Capital broker proof carries dealId after confirmation.
requirements.timeout_behavior: Do not promote to position_open until dealId or get_positions proof exists.

close_fill_proof: position_open requires broker position presence
requirements.recovery_expectation: Startup reconciliation attaches orphan broker positions to recovered lifecycle ids.
requirements.requirement: Open exposure is verified from broker get_positions evidence.
requirements.timeout_behavior: If positions proof is stale or missing, keep lifecycle active but action-held.

close_fill_proof: position_closed requires position absence after close acknowledgement
requirements.recovery_expectation: Open dealIds survive restart until absence or closed-trade proof is recorded.
requirements.requirement: Close is only final after broker positions no longer include the deal.
requirements.timeout_behavior: A close acknowledgement without absence proof remains close_acknowledged or close_failed.

close_fill_proof: partial/full fills carry filled and remaining quantities
requirements.recovery_expectation: Startup query of open orders attaches client_order_id or broker order id.
requirements.requirement: Alpaca order status is correlated by client/order id and explicit lifecycle status.
requirements.timeout_behavior: Unknown REST result stays unverified until stream/query proof resolves it.

close_fill_proof: executionReport supplies order status, last fill, cumulative fill, and fees when available
requirements.recovery_expectation: Startup open-order query attaches newClientOrderId and orderId to lifecycle.
requirements.requirement: Binance newClientOrderId and executionReport/query proof reconcile order state.
requirements.source: Binance Spot API orders and user data stream
requirements.timeout_behavior: 5XX/timeout status is unknown until user stream or order query proof appears.

close_fill_proof: openOrders carries volume, filled volume, cost, fees, and status updates
requirements.recovery_expectation: Startup openOrders query attaches cl_ord_id and Kraken order id.
requirements.requirement: Kraken cl_ord_id/openOrders/order query proof reconciles order state.
requirements.source: Kraken Spot API cl_ord_id and openOrders
requirements.timeout_behavior: Unknown submit result stays unverified until openOrders or query proof resolves it.

close_fill_proof: active routes remain exclusive until terminal or recovered-closed proof
requirements.recovery_expectation: Recovered active routes block duplicate submissions after restart.
requirements.requirement: A second lifecycle is blocked while the same route is submitted/open.
requirements.timeout_behavior: Submitted/open/timeout-unverified lifecycles block duplicate route submission.

close_fill_proof: orphan state remains active until broker terminal proof appears
requirements.recovery_expectation: Recovered lifecycle ids are stable by broker deal/order id.
requirements.requirement: Broker state found on startup is attached to a recovered lifecycle with missing links visible.
requirements.timeout_behavior: Missing upstream links are visible as lifecycle_continuity_missing, not hidden.

close_fill_proof: close acknowledgement alone is not closed
outcome_recorded requires P/L evidence
requirements.recovery_expectation: Recovered routes stay duplicate-blocked until verified close or outcome proof.
requirements.requirement: A recovered Capital position can move through close request, close acknowledgement, broker absence, and final P/L outcome without fabricating upstream links.
